1. Executive Summary

The external reconnaissance scope for abtis.de identified 40 discovered assets, of which 40 were prioritized for deeper analysis based on exposure, service composition, and observed risk indicators.

Overall exposure is assessed as HIGH. The most relevant findings are concentrated in exposed web services, vulnerable internet-facing hosts, and a small set of infrastructure entries requiring analyst review first.
